name: Driftleaf
description: Leaves drifting down at random angles, re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 45deg, 90deg, 135deg, 180deg, 225deg, 270deg, 315deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 76%; height: 76%; margin: 12%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); border-radius: 0 100% 0 100%; -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
